name: minipupper-task-runner
description: Processes ALL pending minipupper tasks. Triggered on-demand by the app. Handles web_search, robot.*, explore, implement, query.

payload.message:
Minipupper Task Processor

READ: exec cat ~/minipupper-app/tasks.json (host=node, node=YOUR_NODE_NAME)

PROCESS ALL pending tasks IN ORDER (by createdAt). For each:

- web_search -> use web_search tool
- web_fetch -> use web_fetch tool
- robot.*' -> exec on node: python 3 ~/minipupper-app/robot/robot_control.py {action} {duration}
  Mapping: move_forward->forward, move_backward->backward, strafe_right->right,
  strafe_left->left, rotate_cw->cw, rotate_ccw->ccw, look_up->look-up,
  look_down->look-down, raise_body->raise-body, lower_body->lower-body,
  init->activate, deactivate->deactivate, stop->stop, reset->deactivate, trot->activate
  Camera: take_photo_and_show -> capture_and_show.py, show_image -> capture_and_show.py --display-only
- explore -> check knowledge/INDEX.json, return cached info or run exploration
- implement -> build capability, write code to custom/{topic}/main.py, test, set feedback_required=True
- query -> answer from context

Write ALL results to tasks.json in a single write pass at the end.
